# LOMDeviceRequestCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to send requests to a device using lights-out management (LOM).

## Declaration

```swift
object LOMDeviceRequestCommand
```

## Objects

- **LOMDeviceRequestCommand.Command**: The command to send requests to a device using lights-out management (LOM).

## Commands and responses

- **LOMDeviceRequestResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to send requests to a device using lights-out management (LOM).
